AWS Databricks Platform Map

Framework-aligned view of deployed capabilities, modules, and maturity

Full RoadmapOverview📊 Deployment Status🔧 Implementation✅ PrerequisitesAWS FrameworkDatabricks FrameworkModulesMaturity

Platform Maturity

DimensionLevelCapabilities
InfrastructureL4.1Multi-AZ VPC, KMS encryption, PrivateLink, VPC flow logs, CloudWatch monitoring with alarms, spot optimization, sustainability (86%)
PlatformL4.0Complete 4-layer architecture, all 15 modules production-ready, DR runbooks with RTO/RPO, Unity Catalog, full observability
SecurityL4.2SSO/SCIM federation, KMS + DES, audit logs, cross-account IAM, PrivateLink, OIDC authentication, 94% AWS / 92% Databricks WAF
Data GovernanceL3.7Unity Catalog metastore, schema-level access controls, audit delivery, system tables analytics, cost tagging, workspace isolation
Operational ExcellenceL3.9GitOps CI/CD (OIDC), CloudWatch dashboards, DR drills scheduled, incident tracking, comprehensive documentation, 89% AWS / 86% Databricks WAF
Cost ManagementL3.8Real-time anomaly detection (2σ), budget enforcement, spot optimization (80%), cost tagging, weekly spike alerts, 88% AWS / 89% Databricks WAF
